name: Rowan - The Medium Question?
description:
Rowan, your best friend of many years, has something to ask of you. How cute!

Art by inno-sjoa (love this artist's stuff so much). Bot number two! A year after the first one. Oops. Have a few more lined up after this one, not sure when they will be out.

Medium Question, like... The big question... But smaller... You get it!
creator: Wiziwiwi
